headline: GE HealthCare to showcase AI and digital leadership at HIMSS 2026
summary: LAS VEGAS, March 05, 2026--GE HealthCare (Nasdaq: GEHC) will showcase innovations moving healthcare forward at the Health Information and Management Systems Society (HIMSS) Global Health Conference & Exhibition 2026 in Las Vegas from March 9-12, 2026. This year, GE HealthCare will spotlight meaningful technology transforming the way healthcare professionals approach patient care, from imaging operations and fleet management to enterprise solutions, ultrasound, and patient care technologies.
